name: status-placeholder
description: Vite development environment for MVU Status Bar

scripts.build:mvu: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=mvu vite build && cross-env BUILD_TARGET=mvu node scripts/build-post.js && cross-env BUILD_TARGET=mvu node scripts/validate-build.js
scripts.build:shujuku: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=shujuku vite build && cross-env BUILD_TARGET=shujuku node scripts/build-post.js && cross-env BUILD_TARGET=shujuku node scripts/validate-build.js
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:mvu && pnpm run build:shujuku
